parsed_review.summary: CP00-383 (RP12.P07.M05.S05-S14, risk A, 10 units, micro "Permission And Audit Binding", deliverables failure_recovery:8/security_audit:1/implementation:1) is a clean descriptor-only pack that passes read-only review with no findings. Plan binding, manifest plan_binding_snapshot, contract projection (contracts/billing-core-contract.json), README, and source (registry.js pack binding/requirements/no-write attestation; service.js createBillingCoreCp383* factories; validators.js coverage+slice validators) are mutually consistent, matching source_ledger_sha with deviation_from_plan:false. All 10 rows are descriptor_only:true, runtime_execution:false, customer_safe_errors_only:true, raw_payload_included:false, and the contract's embedded descriptor matches source byte-for-byte. No write/IO/network/SQL paths exist in billing source — only frozen descriptor factories and false attestation flags. Hermes usage is confined to descriptor evidence-packet identifiers (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt:false), not product runtime. Claude authority boundary is preserved: claude_is_final_approval:false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust:false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening:true; manifest production_ready:false/runtime_ready:false is an honest descriptor-only posture and production_ready_candidate is correctly scoped to coverage.valid && slice.valid. Evidence integrity holds: auth preflight passed with valid JSON, all 24 command-evidence entries exit_code 0, source inspected via Read/Grep/Glob (summary-only correctly disallowed because a security_audit deliverable is present), and invalid_review_blockers enumerate the CP178+ rejections. Three CP00-383 unit tests plus the contract validate script enforce coverage, descriptor-only rows, authority boundaries, and contract deep-equality. Post-review artifacts (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json) are not yet present, which is expected since they follow this read-only step in the hardening_sequence and are not gated by this review.
